executiveImprovementReport.objective: Atlas Documentary Benchmark #4 Sprint 20 topic-selection validation

openingEffectiveness.summary: Opening hook lands with strong immediate stakes.

audienceRetentionRisk.summary: Retention risk is elevated in mid-story beat cadence.

narrativeBeatQuality.summary: Narrative beat construction is coherent and progressive.

visualProgression.summary: Visual progression needs sharper stylistic progression by beat.

narrationQuality.summary: Narration delivery requires stronger emotional contouring.

editingRhythm.summary: Editing rhythm should rebalance long reflective spans.

endingEffectiveness.summary: Ending closes with clear implication and viewer directive.

recommendations.action: Split Beat 1 into two beats: a 5-second unresolved opening question and a 6-second evidence anchor before Act I context.
recommendations.rationale: Opening strength remains below target for The 2008 Financial Crisis: Lehman Brothers collapse, contagion, and how regulation reshaped global finance. A dual-step opener increases immediacy without collapsing curiosity.
recommendations.expectedImpact: Higher first-30-second retention and clearer investigative premise.

recommendations.action: Increase emotional intensity in Beat 22 narration and add one unresolved question before transition to the next beat.
recommendations.rationale: Mid-story beats show higher risk of attention drop when escalation is informational but not affective.
recommendations.expectedImpact: Reduced midpoint drop-off and stronger forward pull.

recommendations.action: Delay reveal in Beat 37 by one beat and add a corroborating setup beat immediately before it.
recommendations.rationale: Research confidence (5.7/10) indicates reveal payload should be scaffolded with clearer evidence progression.
recommendations.expectedImpact: Improved reveal credibility and better payoff sequencing.

recommendations.action: Replace Beat 6 visual style with contrastive evidence-board composition to mark progression from context to accountability.
recommendations.rationale: Reflective cadence beats should visually signal narrative phase change, not maintain static mood continuity.
recommendations.expectedImpact: Clearer visual arc and stronger scene differentiation.

recommendations.action: Shorten Beat 46 by 3 seconds and move one supporting sentence into the following beat to tighten cadence.
recommendations.rationale: Long reflective beat duration weakens pacing momentum during late-stage progression.
recommendations.expectedImpact: More consistent rhythm and stronger pre-ending acceleration.

recommendations.action: Add an explicit unresolved institutional question in Beat 60 before the final viewer action prompt.
recommendations.rationale: With quality gate passed and storytelling score 8.2/10, ending optimization should focus on post-viewer reflection depth.
recommendations.expectedImpact: Stronger closing impact and higher likelihood of follow-on engagement.
